response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience spanning Node.js/TypeScript, React, and multiple backend languages, with current work directly involving AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — a strong match for the role's primary stack and AI agent requirement. Demonstrated ownership across product, infrastructure, and open-source projects.
strengths: Primary stack match: TypeScript, Node.js, React across multiple senior roles
Current hands-on AI agent and MCP framework development
Broad polyglot backend experience (Java, Kotlin-adjacent JVM work, Python-adjacent scripting, DLang) plus DevOps/Docker/Kubernetes
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate divided stack depth
